title: Foxglove Records community-radio ad spot: clean the recorded VO takes + station tag, confirm the read against the guide mix, and assemble a mix-ready :30/:60 audio package
one_line_ask: Take the label's already-recorded voiceover takes, station tag, supplied music bed, and rough guide mix, clean every spoken recording to an isolated speech stem, confirm the read against the guide mix, and hand back one organised, mix-ready :30/:60 radio-spot audio package (final layer-mix flagged as the human-finish step).

assets.name: music_bed_acoustic_loop.wav
assets.note: No music-generation model exists — soft ambient PLACEHOLDER for the supplied instrumental bed (~70s intended).

qc.transcript: Hey there! Get ready to experience the Foxglove Porch Sessions. We're talking amazing live music and community vibes right on our porch. And it's all happening every Saturday evening. Best part? It's completely free and open to all ages, so gather your friends and family. Come discover some incredib
Foxglove Community Radio 98.3. Supported by listeners like you.

issues: The audio's cutoff point at the end of the script differs slightly from the intended script, producing 'visiti' instead of 'vis'. While the message remains intact up to the cutoff, this constitutes a minor length discrepancy.

qc.transcript: This spring, Foxglove Records brings the Porch Sessions back to the neighborhood. Six Saturday evenings of live acoustic music on the front steps of the old library. Free, all ages, bring a folding chair. Doors and porches open at six, with the first notes ringing out shortly after. Imagine warm eve

Welcome to a new day, a chance to reset, to rediscover, to simply be. In the everyday hustle, it's easy to overlook the small wonders around us.
